title: 📋 Ludivine — Overview

text.content: Ludivine is an initiatory literary/spiritual project built as a structured multi-book canon. Its architecture combines symbolic numerology, musical/octave logic, chapter-level initiation paths, and elemental distribution. The current stable canon is a 5-book series, each with 12 chapters, using a 9-pearl-per-chapter model.
